findings.message: Cesium must not leak past AeroFightersGeoref — enforce via Build.cs whitelist and CI grep gate.
R1: Cesium for Unreal may drop UE 5.4 mid-MVP; pin via exact commit SHA and mirror upstream.
R2: Georef seam violation (raw FVector cm in gameplay) breaks the if-slip rule and AA-gun placement portability.
F1 (forbidden): skipping the georef abstraction makes the if-slip rule un-executable.
F2 (forbidden): flight math in Blueprint guarantees mid-sprint rewrite + retune; recommend C++ FlightComponent with BP-exposed tuning.
F3 (forbidden): committing Cesium tile bytes to git violates Google Tiles ToS and bloats repo.
F4 (forbidden): Combat reaching mutably into GameState recreates v1 side-effect anti-pattern.
BP-first is not safe for the flight tick path on the 3060 / 60 FPS budget.
R3: Cesium tile-streaming hitches can spike 50–80 ms on game thread; pre-warm at MENU and cap tile cache.
R4: Linux Vulkan vs Windows DX12 shader differences will fail per-pixel diff; mandate SSIM/pHash tolerance.
Anti-pattern watch: God GameMode — hard cap AAeroGameMode at 150 LOC C++ / 80 BP nodes.
Do not copy v1 sortie-state TRANSITIONS map verbatim; port to UE-idiomatic switch on tuple.
Anti-pattern watch: BP Cast-To chains — use BP Interfaces for HUD-to-Pawn wiring.
Anti-pattern watch: Anemic Domain Model in Core — types must expose behavior, not raw fields.
R5: Cesium default-config drift across versions — set all config explicitly, never default.
R6: Google 3D Tiles license vs offline cache (OQ-05) — cache path via env var, never committed.
R7: UE 5.4 is on maintenance; defer UE bump to v2.1 discovery.
Proposed 7-module layout: Core, Georef (Cesium-only), Gameplay, Combat, HUD, Audio, Harness (EditorOnly).
Slim 4-state sortie machine (Menu/Airborne/Crashed/SessionEnded) ported from v1 — redesigned, not omitted.
Concessions C1–C4: roll Audio+HUD into Gameplay, no custom plugins, defer Strategy for flight model.
BP-to-C++ promotion trigger proposed (closes OQ-02): 0.30 ms/frame per class, 2.0 ms total BP VM, 150-node soft cap.

decisions_required: Synthesis must adjudicate O3 (BP-first interpretation for FlightComponent) — game-developer has tie-breaker per Decision Authority Matrix.
Synthesis must adjudicate O1 (SSIM vs per-pixel screenshot-diff tolerance) — game-tester has tie-breaker.
Operator must finalize if-slip rule wording (OQ-04); architectural proposal supplied for both Linux-drop and Cesium-swap fallbacks.
Product-engineer must clarify whether foundation 'no external assets' rule extends to UE5 (O5) — Quixel/Marketplace assets needed within 4 weeks.
Devops-engineer must pick exact Cesium plugin commit SHA (OQ-10) within the compat envelope documented in this report.
Synthesis must add ACs AC-V2-13 (Cesium isolation lint), AC-V2-14 (FGeoCoord round-trip), AC-V2-15 (GameMode size cap) to SPEC section 7.
